demo.intro: Follow one NEET physics topic from a plain-text prompt to a finished branded video, week of reels and localized cuts — no camera, crew or editor.

items.title: "Add Tamil captions"
items.sub: Preview ready — accept, reject or refine

steps.title: Type a topic, get a finished video
steps.text: This is Vimotion, Vacademy's AI video studio. Type a brief — or paste a PDF, deck or URL — and the AI writes the script, records the voiceover, designs every animated scene and renders a branded MP4 in minutes.

steps.title: Speak to every learner, in their language
steps.text: Pick from 200+ voices across 60+ narration languages — including 9 Indian languages with 35+ authentic Indian voices — set the audience from Class 1–2 to Graduate, and choose any length from 30 seconds to 10 minutes.

steps.title: Know the cost before you generate
steps.text: An itemized credit estimate prices your exact setup — tier, duration, voice, avatar — next to your live balance, before you press Generate. Past runs sit in history, so you can reopen results or reuse their settings.

steps.title: Watch production, stage by stage
steps.text: Live progress streams through script, voiceover, storyboard and render. Pause at the script to review the narration, leave and come back, or resume a failed run from its last checkpoint without losing spend.

steps.title: Real motion design, not templates
steps.text: Scenes come from a library of 18+ animated types — equation builds, data stories, kinetic titles — across 8 visual themes. On Premium and above, an AI vision pass inspects every rendered frame for defects before it ships.

steps.title: Direct the AI like a filmmaker
steps.text: Assist Mode pauses at checkpoints you choose — concept, shot plan, narration, casting — and asks for your call in chat. Put a presenter on camera too: pick from 30+ avatars or build one from a single photo of your teacher.

steps.title: Five quality tiers, your presenter
steps.text: Trade cost for polish across Free to Super Ultra tiers. Your avatar — cloned from a photo or a 2-minute phone recording — presents lip-synced in 80+ languages, and a 2-minute audio sample clones the voice to match.

steps.title: Edit in plain English
steps.text: Rewrite one sentence and only that line is re-recorded in the same voice and spliced in. Or type instructions like "cut the intro" — the assistant shows a preview and applies a surgical patch, never a costly full regeneration.

steps.title: One lecture, a week of reels
steps.text: Point Vimotion at any long recording: a free scan scores up to 50 moments on hook strength and pacing, then renders the winners as 9:16 reels with karaoke captions, auto b-roll and silence trimming — you pay only for keepers.

steps.title: Localized into 80+ markets
steps.text: Translate the finished video into 80+ languages with frame-accurate lip sync, so it looks filmed in Tamil or Bengali — not dubbed. A brand glossary protects names like "NEET", and reviewers approve lines per market before render.
